nodes.name: Emberiza
nodes.summary: Emberiza（Emberiza）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联42种鸟类，如Cabanis's bunting、Brown-rumped bunting、Cape bunting等42种鸟类。

nodes.name: Lark-like bunting
nodes.summary: The lark-like bunting (Emberiza impetuani) is a species of bird in the family Emberizidae, which is native to south-western Africa. It is found in Angola, Botswana, Lesotho, Namibia, South Africa, and Zimbabwe. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References External links Lark-like bunting - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds. Lark-like bunting Structured guide to the species in southern Africa

nodes.name: 奧馬魯魯
nodes.summary: 奧馬魯魯是非洲西南部國家納米比亞的城市，由埃龍戈區負責管轄，位於該國中部奧馬魯魯河畔，建城於1872年5月22日，2010年人口估計約4,800。
